description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, H

This technique must be used on soft ground, and creates an area of quicksand.

A character approaching the patch of quicksand at a walking pace can make a Survival check (DC 18) to detect it before it steps in.

A running or charging character does not receive such a check, and if it passes through, it will be carried 1d2 x 5 ft into the quicksand before coming to a stop.

A character caught in quicksand must make a Swim check (DC 10) every round to prevent itself from sinking, or it can attempt a DC 15 Swim check to move 5 ft in any non-vertical direction of their choice. Characters who fail a Swim check sink below the surface, and will have to hold their breath and/or start drowning. A successful Swim check (DC 15, +1 per round spent sunk below the surface) allows you to resurface.

A character outside the quicksand may use a pole of some sort (a spear shaft, a sturdy branch) or a length of rope to pull a creature out, as long as that item can reach the target. The rescuer makes a Strength check (DC 15) as a full-round action. The trapped creature must make a Strength check (DC 10) to hold on to the pole or rope. If they fail, they must make a Swim check (DC 15) to avoid sinking (as above). If both Strength checks succeeded, the trapped creature is pulled 5 ft towards the rescuer.
